title: VicuCraft
description: A Minecraft modpack meant to give the game a well deserved refresh.  Inspired by the Realismcraft addon for Minecraft Bedrock by Spark Universe. Still heavy W.I.P.
body:
This is a Minecraft modpack striding to have the same feel as the RealismCraft addon for Minecraft Bedrock Edition by Spark Universe.

It has many features, key ones include:
-  a much smoother inventory management experience
-  overhauled and diversified atmosphere
-  lots of new particle effects
-  performance optimizations
-  new worldgen
-  and much more!


If you've ever wanted to play something similar to RealismCraft without spending money, this is for you.

The project is still heavily work in progress but I will be updating this based on user feedback and of my own volition.
